CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-31-2018 Continued To Sep-04-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents; Request For Sanctions In The Amount Of $1,380.00; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Michelle L. Weiss Esq.; (Proposed) Order
Off Calendar Jan-16-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Ryan Sanders, Esq. 415-775-4455 ext. 318 for Defendant.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JON BECKHAM's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents; Request For Sanctions In The Amount Of $1,380.00.

Plaintiff's motion to compel further responses to request for production of documents and for monetary sanctions is denied. Defendants served a verified response to plaintiff's request for production on October 26, 2017. Plaintiff's motion was not filed until 49 days later, on December 14, 2017. Thus plaintiff fails to meet the mandatory 45-day time limit for a motion to compel further responses and the court has no authority to grant a late motion. (CCP section 2031.310(c ); Sexton v. Sup. Ct. (1997) 58 Cal.App.4th 1403, 1404, 1409-1410.) Plaintiff's motion also fails to satisfy the meet and confer requirement of CCP section 2031.310(b)(2). Sanctions in the amount of $625.00 are awarded against plaintiff and in favor of defendants.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge Pro Tem: Melinda Derish, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D302/JPT/HK)
